description: 3-question health check: property age, spray foam present, selling/remortgaging. Shows risk level (urgent/maintenance) then reveals exhaustive lead capture form.
social_caption: 🏠 Is your home at risk? Take our 60-second Insulation & Mortgage Health Check. Free. Instant result. Link in bio.

description: 8-item checklist: CWI installed, free/subsidised, within 15 years, damp, mould, colder, render cracking, no survey. Scores claim strength (strong/possible/early).
social_caption: ⚠️ Could you claim for wrongly installed cavity wall insulation? Tick the statements that apply and see your claim strength. Free. Link in bio.

description: 5-step severity quiz: location, duration, mould type, insulation link, worsening. Calculates severity percentage with visual bar (mild/moderate/critical).
social_caption: 🔍 How bad is your damp & mould problem? Answer 5 quick questions to find out. Free damage assessment. Link in bio.

description: Visual scheme selector (ECO, Green Deal, HHCRO, Warm Front, Energy Company, Not Sure) + confirmation questions. Calculates eligibility level with claim value estimate.
social_caption: 🏛️ Was your insulation installed under a government scheme? Check if you could claim £10k–£50k+. Free eligibility check. Link in bio.

description: Input property value, insulation type, property type, severity slider. Calculates devaluation, removal cost, repair cost, potential claim. 4-card breakdown + insight text.
social_caption: 💰 How much is bad insulation REALLY costing you? Use our free calculator. The numbers will shock you. Link in bio.
